product_type_description: A platform that connects sellers/providers with buyers/customers and helps the transaction happen.

minimum_team_roles.description: Runs the marketplace and decides the rules.
Finds providers, checks them, and publishes listings.
Handles user problems, refunds, and disputes.
Maintains the platform, payments, and admin functions.

minimum_tools.description: Manage users, listings, requests, and statuses.
Collect customer payments and send provider payouts.
Receive and track customer and provider issues.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Approve or reject new providers.
Approve, reject, or fix listings.
Check that requests, orders, or bookings move forward.
Resolve refunds, complaints, and failed transactions.

product_type_description: A business where customers reserve a time slot for a service or session.

minimum_team_roles.description: Runs the service, sets the rules, and solves problems.
Manages availability, bookings, reschedules, and cancellations.
Delivers the appointment or makes sure it is delivered.

minimum_tools.description: Shows available time slots and records bookings.
Sends confirmations, reminders, and booking changes.
Collects deposits, prepayments, or final payment when needed.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Keep bookable time slots accurate.
Make sure new appointments are correctly recorded.
Process reschedules, cancellations, and no-show cases.
Make sure each booked appointment is actually completed.

product_type_description: Software people or companies use online to solve a specific problem, usually through a browser or app.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the product, pricing, and customer decisions.
Builds and maintains the product, hosting, and core systems.
Handles user issues, bugs, and basic onboarding help.

minimum_tools.description: Runs the product and keeps it available online.
Lets users sign up, log in, and access their accounts.
Collects subscriptions or one-time payments.
Receives and tracks user questions and bug reports.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Check that the app is working and key flows do not fail.
Reply to user issues and unblock customers.
Resolve issues that stop users from using the product.
Make sure accounts and billing are working correctly.

product_type_description: A product that other software developers integrate into their own apps or systems.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the product, pricing, and developer offering.
Builds and maintains the API, infrastructure, and integrations.
Handles integration issues, API questions, and incident communication.

minimum_tools.description: Runs the API and keeps endpoints available.
Issues credentials and controls access.
Shows endpoints, inputs, outputs, and usage examples.
Tracks requests, failures, and service health.
Measures usage and collects payment when needed.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Check that endpoints respond and core flows do not fail.
Find failed requests, broken integrations, and abnormal usage.
Reply to integration problems and unblock users.
Check API keys, limits, and billing or quota issues.

product_type_description: A product that collects, processes, or presents data so users can monitor or make decisions.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the product, target users, and reporting offer.
Builds and maintains data collection, processing, and delivery.
Handles access issues, data questions, and basic onboarding help.

minimum_tools.description: Collects source data and stores it for processing.
Shows analytics, reports, or metrics to users.
Tracks refresh failures, delays, and broken pipelines.
Controls who can view data and reports.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Make sure data updates run on time.
Fix broken imports, transforms, or report updates.
Check that important numbers and dashboards look correct.
Resolve access problems and answer report questions.

product_type_description: A tool that automates repeated business tasks or helps a team run internal processes.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the workflow, users, and business rules.
Builds and maintains the automation, integrations, and fixes.
Runs the workflow and checks that automated steps match real operations.

minimum_tools.description: Runs the defined steps, triggers, and actions.
Lets operators review runs, statuses, and manual overrides.
Connects the tool to the systems used in the workflow.
Shows failed runs, broken steps, and urgent issues.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Check that automations complete and do not get stuck.
Fix broken actions, missing data, and integration errors.
Process cases the automation cannot complete alone.
Make sure the workflow results match the intended process.

product_type_description: A consumer app used directly by end users, usually on mobile or web.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the product, target users, and growth decisions.
Builds and maintains the app, backend, and releases.
Handles user issues, account problems, and refund cases.

minimum_tools.description: Runs the app, stores user data, and supports core actions.
Lets users sign up, log in, and recover access.
Publishes updates and manages app versions.
Receives and tracks user problems and questions.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Check that the app opens and core user flows work.
Reply to account issues, bugs, and usage problems.
Resolve issues that block users from using the app.
Make sure signups and paid flows work correctly when used.

product_type_description: A platform where users interact, post, discuss, and build a network or group.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the community rules, growth, and platform direction.
Reviews posts, users, reports, and rule violations.
Builds and maintains the platform, accounts, and core features.

minimum_tools.description: Runs the platform and keeps it available online.
Lets users create accounts, log in, and recover access.
Manage users, posts, reports, and enforcement actions.
Lets users report content, spam, and abuse.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Check flagged posts, comments, and accounts.
Remove bad content and take action on abusive users.
Check that posting, messaging, and account flows work.
Resolve account problems, abuse complaints, and access issues.

product_type_description: A business where users pay regularly to keep access to content, benefits, or services.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the offer, pricing, and membership rules.
Manages member access, renewals, cancellations, and support.
Maintains the platform, recurring payments, and access controls.

minimum_tools.description: Charges members and tracks renewals and failed payments.
Controls who gets the member benefits or protected access.
Receives and tracks member questions and issues.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Make sure new paid members receive access correctly.
Check renewals, payment failures, and expired access.
Process membership stops and payment issues.
Resolve access problems and membership questions.

product_type_description: A business built around attracting an audience and monetizing attention.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the audience, content direction, and revenue decisions.
Creates or manages the publishing of core content.
Handles publishing, distribution, and basic audience support.

minimum_tools.description: Publishes content and keeps the audience access point live.
Sends updates, newsletters, or distribution messages.
Tracks reach, engagement, and audience growth.
Collects sponsor, subscription, or product revenue when used.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Make sure planned content goes out on time.
Check core distribution channels and audience responses.
Track which content brings attention, engagement, or revenue.
Reply to important messages, sponsor needs, or access problems.

product_type_description: A business that sells downloadable or digital goods.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the offer, pricing, and product decisions.
Creates, updates, and maintains the digital product.
Handles delivery issues, access problems, and refund requests.

minimum_tools.description: Sells the product and collects payment.
Delivers files or access after purchase.
Stores the digital product files for delivery.
Receives and tracks customer issues.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Make sure buyers receive the product correctly.
Resolve access issues, broken files, and refund cases.
Fix outdated files, descriptions, or broken purchase links.
Check that checkout and payment flows work.

product_type_description: A business that teaches skills or helps people improve through lessons, programs, or coaching.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the offer, pricing, and delivery model.
Delivers the training, sessions, or coaching.
Manages enrollments, scheduling, access, and support.

minimum_tools.description: Delivers lessons, sessions, or coaching to learners.
Registers learners and collects payment.
Sends updates, reminders, and session links.
Tracks learner participation and completion.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Make sure new learners are registered and get access.
Make sure scheduled lessons or coaching sessions happen.
Resolve access problems, schedule issues, and learner questions.
Record attendance, progress, or completion.

product_type_description: A business that sells physical products directly to customers.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the offer, pricing, and sales decisions.
Manages stock, orders, packing, and fulfillment.
Handles buyer questions, returns, refunds, and delivery issues.

minimum_tools.description: Shows products and accepts customer orders.
Collects customer payments at checkout.
Tracks available stock and product availability.
Processes orders and manages delivery status.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Make sure paid orders are recorded and ready for fulfillment.
Pack products and move orders to delivery.
Keep stock counts accurate after sales or returns.
Resolve order problems, returns, refunds, and delivery complaints.

product_type_description: A site that lists businesses or opportunities and captures customer inquiries.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the niche, listing rules, and revenue model.
Adds listings, checks accuracy, and handles incoming leads.
Maintains the site, forms, tracking, and admin functions.

minimum_tools.description: Stores, publishes, and updates directory entries.
Helps users find relevant listings.
Collects inquiries, calls, or contact requests.
Manage listings, leads, and basic site operations.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Keep listings accurate, live, and correctly categorized.
Make sure inquiries are captured and routed correctly.
Delete duplicates, spam, or broken entries.
Check that search, pages, and lead forms work.

product_type_description: A business that provides a service in a specific local area.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the service, pricing, and local operating rules.
Performs the service or makes sure it is delivered correctly.
Handles inquiries, scheduling, changes, and complaints.

minimum_tools.description: Receives customer requests, bookings, or service inquiries.
Sends confirmations, updates, and follow-up messages.
Collects deposits or final payment.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Review new customer inquiries and bookings.
Make sure service times and assignments are clear.
Complete the booked job or appointment.
Resolve delays, complaints, and payment problems.

product_type_description: A service customers request when they need it, often expecting quick response.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the service rules, pricing, and coverage area.
Assigns incoming requests and tracks delivery or completion.
Performs the service or makes sure providers complete it.

minimum_tools.description: Receives customer orders or service requests in real time.
Assigns requests and tracks service status.
Sends confirmations, updates, and arrival notices.
Collects payment for completed or accepted requests.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Review and accept new service requests.
Route each request to the right delivery owner.
Track progress, delays, and failed service cases.
Resolve cancellations, complaints, and payment problems.

product_type_description: A service business that does work for clients as a custom project or recurring service.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the offer, pricing, client scope, and delivery rules.
Performs the client work or makes sure it is completed correctly.
Manages inquiries, onboarding, timelines, and client communication.

minimum_tools.description: Collects leads, project details, and service requests.
Tracks client tasks, deliverables, and deadlines.
Handles updates, approvals, and delivery discussions.
Sends invoices and collects client payments.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Check incoming leads, scope, and fit.
Keep deliverables moving and deadlines on track.
Communicate progress, questions, and approvals.
Make sure invoices, payments, and final handoff are completed.

product_type_description: A service packaged in a fixed, repeatable format with clear scope and pricing.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the offer, pricing, package scope, and delivery rules.
Performs the standardized service and completes the deliverables.
Manages orders, required inputs, updates, and handoff.

minimum_tools.description: Collects purchases, requests, and required client information.
Tracks each order, step, and delivery deadline.
Handles questions, updates, and approval messages.
Collects payment for the packaged service.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Check incoming purchases and confirm needed client inputs.
Complete the defined service steps and outputs.
Send updates, request missing information, and answer questions.
Make sure final handoff and payment status are complete.

product_type_description: A business that sells expert advice, diagnosis, or recommendations.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the offer, pricing, scope, and client decisions.
Delivers the advice, analysis, and client recommendations.
Manages inquiries, scheduling, documents, and follow-up.

minimum_tools.description: Collects inquiries, project details, and client needs.
Books calls, sessions, and consulting meetings.
Prepares and shares reports, recommendations, or outputs.
Sends invoices and collects client payments.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Check fit, scope, and next steps for incoming requests.
Complete the analysis, advice, or expert sessions.
Send updates, request inputs, and answer client questions.
Make sure meetings, invoices, and collections are handled.

product_type_description: A business that takes over an ongoing operational function for clients.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the service scope, pricing, client commitments, and rules.
Runs daily delivery, assigns work, and checks service quality.
Performs the recurring operational tasks for clients.

minimum_tools.tool: work queue or case management system
minimum_tools.description: Tracks incoming client work, statuses, and handoffs.
Handles updates, escalations, and client requests.
Shows workload, deadlines, and service status.
Bills clients for recurring service delivery.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Check new client tasks, requests, or cases.
Route tasks to the right operator and complete them.
Check deadlines, backlogs, and missed client commitments.
Resolve blocked cases, quality problems, and urgent requests.

product_type_description: A business that connects two sides of a deal and earns a fee or commission.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the deal model, pricing, partner rules, and transaction process.
Finds counterparties, matches requests, and moves deals forward.
Handles buyer or seller questions, issues, and transaction problems.

minimum_tools.description: Collects buyer, seller, or partner requests.
Stores available counterparties, offers, and contact details.
Tracks matches, negotiations, and transaction status.
Records fees and collects payment when deals close.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Check new buyer, seller, or partner inquiries.
Connect the right parties based on the request.
Track progress, missing steps, and stalled transactions.
Resolve communication problems, disputes, and fee questions.

product_type_description: A business that buys products from producers or suppliers and resells them to others.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the product lines, pricing, supplier terms, and sales rules.
Manages stock, supplier orders, and customer fulfillment.
Handles buyer inquiries, order issues, and account follow-up.

minimum_tools.description: Tracks available stock, incoming supply, and product movement.
Records customer orders and tracks fulfillment status.
Places restock orders and tracks supplier deliveries.
Sends invoices or collects payment for orders.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Review customer orders and confirm stock availability.
Pick, pack, and move orders to delivery or pickup.
Track low inventory and restock needs.
Resolve delays, damaged goods, and order problems.

product_type_description: A business that sells goods in bulk, usually to other businesses rather than end customers.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the product lines, pricing, buyer terms, and supplier terms.
Manages stock, bulk orders, storage, and shipment handling.
Handles buyer inquiries, repeat orders, and account issues.

minimum_tools.description: Tracks stock, bulk quantities, and product availability.
Records buyer orders, account details, and fulfillment status.
Places restock orders and tracks inbound supply.
Sends invoices and collects buyer payments.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Review new bulk orders and confirm stock availability.
Pick, pack, and move wholesale orders to delivery.
Track low inventory and place supplier orders.
Resolve shortages, delivery problems, and account questions.

product_type_description: A business that buys goods from one country and sells them in another.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the product lines, pricing, trade partners, and shipment rules.
Manages suppliers, shipping steps, customs documents, and delivery flow.
Handles stock, buyer orders, and shipment-related customer issues.

minimum_tools.tool: supplier and buyer order management system
minimum_tools.description: Tracks purchase orders, sales orders, and transaction status.
Tracks freight movement, delivery milestones, and delays.
Stores invoices, shipping documents, and customs paperwork.
Sends invoices and tracks incoming and outgoing payments.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Check purchase orders, sales orders, and shipment progress.
Make sure shipment and customs documents are complete and correct.
Track available stock and expected arrivals.
Resolve delays, document problems, and payment questions.

product_type_description: A business that makes the product itself instead of only reselling it.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the product, pricing, production rules, and supply decisions.
Runs manufacturing, output quality, and daily production flow.
Manages raw materials, finished goods, and customer orders.

minimum_tools.description: Tracks work orders, output, and production status.
Tracks raw materials, finished goods, and stock levels.
Orders materials and tracks incoming supply.
Records customer orders and collects payment.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Start, track, and complete the required production work.
Make sure finished goods meet the expected standard.
Track raw material usage and finished goods availability.
Pack finished goods and move orders to delivery or pickup.

product_type_description: A physical product with electronics, sensors, or connectivity, usually linked to software.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the product, pricing, deployment model, and operating rules.
Builds and maintains the device, firmware, connectivity, and backend.
Handles assembly, inventory, provisioning, and hardware issue follow-up.

minimum_tools.description: Registers devices and tracks status, health, and connectivity.
Receives device data and supports device communication.
Tracks units, parts, and device assignment.
Receives and tracks device failures and customer issues.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Check connectivity, uptime, and failed devices.
Fix hardware, firmware, or backend problems.
Keep units, parts, and replacement stock accurate.
Set up new devices and handle customer device issues.

product_type_description: A business that moves goods from one place to another for customers or merchants.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the service area, pricing, delivery rules, and operating model.
Assigns deliveries, plans routes, and tracks active jobs.
Performs the deliveries or makes sure drivers complete them.

minimum_tools.description: Receives delivery jobs and assigns them for execution.
Tracks driver movement, delivery status, and delays.
Sends delivery updates, confirmations, and issue notices.
Collects delivery fees and tracks payouts when needed.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Check new orders, pickup details, and delivery requirements.
Route each job to the right delivery owner.
Track progress, delays, failed drop-offs, and exceptions.
Resolve address problems, customer complaints, and payment issues.

product_type_description: A business that gives temporary access to an asset instead of selling it.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the asset offer, pricing, rental rules, and access model.
Manages asset availability, handover, return, and condition checks.
Handles booking issues, late returns, damage cases, and customer questions.

minimum_tools.description: Shows available assets and records rental periods.
Collects rental payments and security deposits when needed.
Tracks which assets are available, rented, returned, or unavailable.
Sends confirmations, pickup details, return reminders, and issue updates.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Review new rentals and confirm asset availability.
Give out assets, receive returns, and record status.
Check for damage, missing parts, and readiness for the next rental.
Resolve late returns, damage cases, and customer problems.

product_type_description: A business that fixes, maintains, or services equipment, devices, or property.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the service scope, pricing, and operating rules.
Performs repairs, maintenance work, and quality checks.
Handles requests, scheduling, status updates, and customer issues.

minimum_tools.description: Receives service requests and books repair or maintenance jobs.
Tracks active jobs, status, and completed work.
Sends confirmations, updates, and completion notices.
Collects payment for completed work.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Check incoming repair or maintenance jobs.
Assign time, complete the work, and record status.
Make sure needed items are available for active jobs.
Resolve delays, repeat problems, and payment questions.

product_type_description: A business model where the same brand and operating system is repeated across branches or operators.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the brand, operating rules, pricing model, and branch standards.
Runs branch setup, daily branch performance, and compliance with the model.
Handles branch onboarding, issue follow-up, and operating checks.

minimum_tools.description: Tracks branch details, status, and core operating information.
Stores the rules, processes, and branch instructions.
Collects branch performance and operating data.
Tracks branch payments, fees, or revenue share.

minimum_daily_operations.description: Review branch operations, sales, and service status.
Resolve operating problems, delays, and branch questions.
Check that branches follow the required model.
Make sure branch reporting and payments are up to date.

product_type_description: A business that organizes or sells participation in events, activities, or experiences.

minimum_team_roles.description: Owns the event offer, pricing, schedule, and operating rules.
Plans and runs the event setup, delivery, and on-site flow.
Handles registrations, attendee questions, changes, and complaints.

minimum_tools.description: Sells spots or tickets and records attendee details.
Sends confirmations, reminders, updates, and event instructions.
Tracks timing, tasks, and event execution steps.
Collects ticket, booking, or participation payments.

minimum_physical_materials: event venue or access to event space

minimum_daily_operations.description: Check new attendees, payments, and attendance status.
Make sure the venue, schedule, and setup needs are ready.
Deliver the event and handle on-site or live issues.
Resolve changes, complaints, refunds, and access problems.
